close_reason: pub(crate) is appropriate: test modules are within the crate
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:18-23. namespace/name/key/client are pub(crate). Since the whole crate is one module file, this is equivalent to 'visible to anything in this crate' which is currently only the unit-test modules. Two cleaner options: (a) leave fields private and add #[cfg(test)] inherent accessors used only in tests; (b) leave fields private and put tests in the same impl block. Filing as opinion — this is structural taste with no concrete bug, only signalling.
title: pub(crate) on K8sBackend fields is broader than test-only access requires
